pi_items.source: Verified O*NET SOC code 41-9021.00 corresponds to Real Estate Brokers.
Task description explicitly requires setting first name to Marcus.
Task description explicitly requires setting last name to Whitfield.
Task description explicitly requires this substring in the About me section.
Task description explicitly requires this substring in the About me section.
Task description explicitly requires timezone America/New_York.
Task description explicitly lists phone +1-7035558294, where the expected_phone omits the country code.
Task description explicitly lists these 5 regional office teams to be created.
Task description explicitly requires adding John Smith to the Manhattan Office and National Brand teams.
Task description explicitly limits John Smith's teams to 'only' Manhattan and National Brand, excluding the other 3.
Task description explicitly requires adding this BBC Business RSS feed. URL manually confirmed to be live.
Task description explicitly requires adding John Smith via this email, and setup_task.sh generates this user.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for socioboard_env franchise_social_media_buildout task by confirming that the agent is explicitly instructed to update a synthetic admin profile, create 5 specific teams, assign a synthetic user 'john.smith@socioboard.local' to 2 teams, and subscribe to a real live BBC Business RSS feed. Verified that all metadata claims exactly match the task description parameters. Discovered a critical defect: 'verifier.py' and 'export_result.sh' are entirely missing from the environment, meaning the task is programmatically unscorable and will crash during evaluation.
